_comment: Namocell Hana control link found with `plr-re namocell discover`. transport is 'serial' for a USB-serial bridge (FTDI/CP210x/etc.), endpoint 'path@baud'; or 'usb' for a raw USB device (install the [usb] extra: pyusb + a libusb backend), endpoint 'usb:VID:PID[/out=EP,in=EP]'. The baud rate (serial) and endpoint addresses (usb) are bench unknowns until confirmed. Pass with `plr-re namocell status --config configs/namocell.example.json`.
